changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO plan ( id, code, name, price_monthly, max_projects, max_users, max_tasks, active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES (nextval('sequence_generator'), 'FREE', 'Free', 0.00, 3, 5, 50, true, NOW(), NOW()), (nextval('sequence_generator'), 'PRO', 'Pro', 19.00, 25, 25, 1000, true, NOW(), NOW()), (nextval('sequence_generator'), 'ENTERPRISE', 'Enterprise', 99.00, 100000, 100000, 100000, true, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, price_monthly = EXCLUDED.price_monthly, max_projects = EXCLUDED.max_projects, max_users = EXCLUDED.max_users, max_tasks = EXCLUDED.max_tasks, active = EXCLUDED.active, updated_at = NOW();
